method: Web-research fan-out (WebSearch + WebFetch of GitHub repos, arXiv, Zenodo). Records verified first-hand where confidence=high. row_count_if_known is null wherever line counts were not published and not counted (honesty rule).

artifacts.paper: Mooncake: A KVCache-centric Disaggregated Architecture for LLM Serving (FAST'25; arXiv 2407.00079)
artifacts.contains_measured_labels: partial — arrival timestamps + token lengths derived from real anonymized Kimi production traffic; hash_ids are remapped real prefix-cache relationships; NO measured latency/queue/GPU values
artifacts.contains_cache_metrics: partial — hash_ids encode prefix-cache REUSE structure (block_size=512) enabling cache-hit-rate SIMULATION (README: up to ~50% hit ratio); no per-request hit/miss LABELS
artifacts.notes: Exact fields verified from raw JSONL: {timestamp:int ms relative arrival, input_length:int tokens, output_length:int tokens, hash_ids:[int...]}. Three FAST'25 flavors (conversation 2.89MB, toolagent 4.21MB, synthetic) + earlier arxiv-trace/mooncake_trace.jsonl. REPLAY WORKLOAD trace, not operational telemetry.

artifacts.paper: Splitwise: Efficient Generative LLM Inference Using Phase Splitting (ISCA'24)
artifacts.contains_measured_labels: partial — real production arrival times + token counts (no prompt text)
artifacts.notes: Columns: TIMESTAMP, ContextTokens, GeneratedTokens. Two ~20-min CSVs (code, conv). Splitwise MIGRATION/KV-transfer is a TECHNIQUE in the paper/prototype, NOT a released migration-event log.

artifacts.paper: DynamoLLM: Designing LLM Inference Clusters for Performance and Energy Efficiency (HPCA'25)
artifacts.contains_measured_labels: partial — real production arrival times + token counts
artifacts.notes: Columns: TIMESTAMP, ContextTokens, GeneratedTokens (same schema as 2023, 1-week span 2024-05-10..19). Already partially used in-repo (data/external/azure_llm_2024). Also a 2025 LMM multimodal variant adds image count. NO operational telemetry.

artifacts.paper: Splitwise: Efficient Generative LLM Inference Using Phase Splitting (ISCA'24)
artifacts.contains_measured_labels: partial — same Azure traces; rest is code/simulator
artifacts.notes: 3.1MB zip = traces/ (Azure CSVs) + vllm/ (KV-cache transfer prototype) + splitwise-sim/ (discrete-event simulator). KV/phase transfer is CODE; NO released migration-event log or measured KV-transfer telemetry.

artifacts.paper: Llumnix: Dynamic Scheduling for Large Language Model Serving (OSDI'24; arXiv 2406.03243)
signal_category: migration (TECHNIQUE + reproducible experiments, released logs aggregated)
artifacts.contains_only_aggregates: largely — released history logs processed into Request/Prefill P99/Mean; raw per-request/per-migration rows not documented as a released dataset
artifacts.contains_per_request_events: unknown — produced locally; shipped history_log.zip is summary-oriented
artifacts.contains_migration_metrics: PARTIAL/INDIRECT — live request+KV migration is the core MECHANISM and experiments measure migration overhead, but NO standalone released per-migration-event trace/log
artifacts.notes: Llumnix migration = live-migration MECHANISM (pipelined KV copy) + reproducible AE, NOT a downloadable migration-event log. history_log.zip is for plotting; process_log.py emits .data (P99/Mean) + .claim summaries. The most on-topic MIGRATION project, but no raw per-migration dataset.

artifacts.paper: DistServe: Disaggregating Prefill and Decoding for Goodput-optimized LLM Serving (OSDI'24; arXiv 2401.09670)
signal_category: none released as data (TTFT/TPOT/goodput measured internally)
file_types: .py/.cpp code; datasets prepared locally via docs/repro-dataset.md
artifacts.public_downloadable: code yes / no committed trace or result dataset
artifacts.notes: Eval README points to docs/repro-dataset.md to PREPARE ShareGPT/LongBench/HumanEval-style datasets locally; no trace/result CSV/JSONL committed. Prefill/decode disaggregation is a technique.

artifacts.paper: Taming Throughput-Latency Tradeoff in LLM Inference with Sarathi-Serve (OSDI'24; arXiv 2403.02310)
signal_category: tail_latency / queue / batch produced at RUNTIME by benchmark suite; not shipped as data
artifacts.notes: Ships a benchmark suite that GENERATES metrics; no committed trace/result CSV. Chunked-prefill scheduling technique; same authors as Vidur.

artifacts.paper: Vidur: A Large-Scale Simulation Framework for LLM Inference (MLSys'24; arXiv 2405.05465)
signal_category: cache/memory (partial) — all SIMULATOR OUTPUT + committed workload traces
artifacts.contains_measured_labels: partial — profiling phase uses REAL GPU operator/kernel timings; simulation outputs are SIMULATED
artifacts.contains_queue_metrics: partial — scheduling_delay, batch_sizes, request_arrivals time series
artifacts.contains_cache_metrics: partial — replica memory_usage (KV proxy); no hit/miss labels
artifacts.notes: Commits processed workload traces (data/processed_traces/, incl. splitwise_conv.csv). 23 output metrics (docs/metrics.md): request_e2e_time_cdf, request_scheduling_delay_cdf, prefill/decode CDFs, *_time_series, batch_sizes_cdf, replica MFU/busy/memory — but these are SIMULATED distributions written at runtime, largely aggregate. Richest SIGNAL source but simulated.

artifacts.paper: AlpaServe: Statistical Multiplexing with Model Parallelism for DL Serving (OSDI'23; arXiv 2302.11665)
signal_category: autoscaling/placement + SLO attainment SIMULATED; Azure-function-derived burst profiles
artifacts.public_downloadable: code yes / no labeled trace dataset
artifacts.contains_autoscaling_metrics: partial — models placement/multiplexing in simulation; no released autoscaling EVENT telemetry
artifacts.notes: Pre-LLM DL serving. Simulator + periodic (Azure-function-style) workload profile. No committed per-request operational dataset.

artifacts.paper: Helix: Serving LLMs over Heterogeneous GPUs and Network via Max-Flow (ASPLOS'25; arXiv 2406.01566)
signal_category: replica_contention / heterogeneous placement; throughput/latency SIMULATED + prototype; Azure Conversation trace input
artifacts.notes: Simulator + prototype; uses Azure Conversation dataset as input workload. No released operational telemetry beyond reusing Azure traces.

artifacts.paper: HydraServe: Minimizing Cold Start Latency for Serverless LLM Serving in Public Clouds (NSDI'26; arXiv 2502.15524)
signal_category: cold_start + model_load MEASURED INTERNALLY (1.7x-4.7x reduction), NOT released
artifacts.contains_cold_start_metrics: MEASURED in paper but NOT released as downloadable trace/log
artifacts.notes: Most on-topic project for cold-start/model-load signals. No GitHub/Zenodo/released cold-start trace found. 'measured-but-not-released' case.

artifacts.paper: CacheBlend: Fast LLM Serving for RAG with Cached Knowledge Fusion (EuroSys'25 Best Paper; arXiv 2405.16444)
signal_category: cache_hit (technique ~100% KV reuse for RAG; TTFT/throughput measured, not released)
file_types: .py code; eval uses public QA/RAG benchmarks
artifacts.public_downloadable: code yes / no released cache-event telemetry dataset
artifacts.contains_cache_metrics: technique-level (KV reuse); no released cache-hit/loss EVENT log
artifacts.notes: Implemented inside LMCache; evaluated on 4 public QA/RAG benchmarks (not a new released trace). Cache reuse is a TECHNIQUE; no per-request cache telemetry dataset.

artifacts.paper: SGLang: Efficient Execution of Structured Language Model Programs (NeurIPS'24; arXiv 2312.07104)
signal_category: queue_state — LIVE metrics, NOT a shipped dataset
artifacts.contains_measured_labels: true AT RUNTIME only; nothing published as static dataset
artifacts.notes: RadixAttention prefix cache hit-rate exposed as Prometheus metric (--enable-metrics) + Grafana. Observability infra to RUN, not a downloadable trace.

signal_category: tail_latency — LIVE metrics + OTel, not a dataset
artifacts.notes: dynamo_router_* metrics, engine Prometheus, OTel routing traces, Grafana; AIPerf GENERATES agentic multi-turn KV-cache benchmark traces. Tooling to PRODUCE telemetry, not released data.
